texto: I've been blessed; I've been getting so many amazing opportunities because of the UFC. I know there are going to be haters no matter how successful I am, and I just have to be thankful for all the blessings that I have because all of it can be over before you know it.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Paige VanZant sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “I've been blessed; I've been getting so many amazing opportunities because of the UFC. I know the…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sucesso, thankful, blessed, útil em momentos de blessed e i-am.

frase_original: I've been blessed; I've been getting so many amazing opportunities because of the UFC. I know there are going to be haters no matter how successful I am, and I just have to be thankful for all the blessings that I have because all of it can be over before you know it.

texto: I try to eat healthy for the most part. When I cut weight, I cut pretty much everything out. I don't have protein when I cut weight other than what I might get from something like chicken breast. So I don't eat any extra protein, just because I'm trying to get the weight off. That's the only real diet I have.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Paige VanZant: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I try to eat healthy for the most part. When I cut weight, I cut pretty much everything out. I do…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, trying, healthy pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de healthy e chicken.

texto: I don't go into a fight mad. I go into a fight like it's my birthday. I love what I'm doing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Paige VanZant: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I don't go into a fight mad. I go into a fight like it's my birthday. I love what I'm doing.” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, love, fight pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de aniversario e fight.
